headline: These Chip Stocks Power Sector's Latest Advance
summary: IBD's chip sector is up more than 43% year to date, and much of its strength is now concentrated in makers of power-management chips.  A feeding frenzy has developed among ON Semiconductor, Power Integrations, Navitas Semiconductor, Alpha & Omega Semiconductor and other power-chip stocks.  Data centers, electric vehicles and other power-consuming technologies are increasing demand for electricity.
